description: Observability profile — tracing, evaluation, and cost tracking for monitoring agents and application performance

sentry.description: Query Sentry for error rates, performance traces, and release health

fetch.description: Fetch metrics from monitoring endpoints — health checks, Prometheus, Grafana APIs

postgres.description: Query application database for performance metrics, slow query logs, and pg_stat_statements

filesystem.description: Read and write observability configuration — dashboards, alert rules, sampling configs

memory.description: Track agent execution costs, token usage, and performance baselines across runs
